description: The dataset '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/InvisibilityCloak.csv' is already open, containing data from a field experiment (Field, 2013) investigating whether wearing an invisibility cloak affects mischievous behavior. Perform an independent samples t-test to compare 'Mischief' (dependent variable) between the two 'Cloak' groups (grouping variable: 0 = no cloak, 1 = wearing cloak). The analysis should include Cohen's d effect size, descriptive statistics, and use a two-tailed hypothesis (Group 1 ≠ Group 2).
